shadow_finding: naive per-feed dual-write exceeds the free-tier Worker subrequest limit (~50/req) -> silently dropped; fixed with a per-run write cap (3) + read budget once per run + reset counter
gate: save/hash/readback/idempotency 100% + cost within free-tier budget + subrequest constraint fixed => safe to enter version migration (S2-P02); the literal 7-day/1000-artifact accumulation runs via cron over real time
